{
 "cells": [
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "c8e5eb48c4536ec5",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": "# Tutorial 08 - add_capacity"
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "ed942d9c4f0871e6",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": "## Step 0: Setup the project and prepare the data"
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 1,
   "id": "b21ec67ddca4cdae",
   "metadata": {
    "ExecuteTime": {
     "end_time": "2026-06-19T06:23:44.613287200Z",
     "start_time": "2026-06-19T06:23:43.366488400Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "from pathlib import Path\n",
    "\n",
    "import pydpeet as eet"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "7d7fd220edf40f7f",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": "We will use \"ERROR\" as the logging style for better readability of the notebook"
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 2,
   "id": "32ed4815a3971973",
   "metadata": {
    "ExecuteTime": {
     "end_time": "2026-06-19T06:23:44.641655500Z",
     "start_time": "2026-06-19T06:23:44.615291500Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "eet.set_logging_style(\"ERROR\")"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 5,
   "id": "4369ca050fa5ded0",
   "metadata": {
    "ExecuteTime": {
     "end_time": "2026-06-19T06:24:35.138830700Z",
     "start_time": "2026-06-19T06:24:20.568159800Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "standardized_dataframes = eet.read(\n",
    "    input_path=str(Path.cwd().parent.parent / \"res\" / \"raw_data_from_cyclers\"),\n",
    "    config=eet.ReadConfig.Neware_8_0_0_516,\n",
    ")"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 6,
   "id": "74ed8af7187d1a6b",
   "metadata": {
    "ExecuteTime": {
     "end_time": "2026-06-19T06:24:36.661413800Z",
     "start_time": "2026-06-19T06:24:35.362887900Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "standardized_data_merged = eet.merge_into_series(standardized_dataframes)"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 7,
   "id": "8bfd8474ec58c59a",
   "metadata": {
    "ExecuteTime": {
     "end_time": "2026-06-19T06:24:40.874072900Z",
     "start_time": "2026-06-19T06:24:38.223438900Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "segmented_data = eet.add_primitive_segments(\n",
    "    df=standardized_data_merged, config=eet.PrimitiveConfig.OCV_ANALYSIS_DEFAULT\n",
    ")"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 9,
   "id": "93fa76aa18d7689",
   "metadata": {
    "ExecuteTime": {
     "end_time": "2026-06-19T06:24:55.150116500Z",
     "start_time": "2026-06-19T06:24:51.037755900Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "image/png": "",
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 3840x648 with 3 Axes>"
      ]
     },
     "jetTransient": {
      "display_id": null
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "eet.visualize_phases(df=segmented_data, config=eet.VisualizationConfig.DEFAULT)"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 10,
   "id": "2ec63aacdbe7e123",
   "metadata": {
    "ExecuteTime": {
     "end_time": "2026-06-19T06:24:58.457252600Z",
     "start_time": "2026-06-19T06:24:58.429167300Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "text/plain": [
       "_BatteryConfigClass(cell_name='Default', c_ref=4.8, soc_start=0, max_voltage=4.2, min_voltage=2.5, threshold_current=0.075, voltage_intervall=0.01, minimal_current_for_capacity=-1.2, maximal_current_for_capacity=-0.8, min_current_diff=0.5, max_time_diff=0.5, min_voltage_diff=0, ignore_negative_resistance_values=False)"
      ]
     },
     "execution_count": 10,
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "execute_result"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "eet.BatteryConfig.DEFAULT"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "1b1379870b3fb93e",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": "## Step 1: add_capacity"
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 11,
   "id": "d2301f6c207d1475",
   "metadata": {
    "ExecuteTime": {
     "end_time": "2026-06-19T06:25:03.684524100Z",
     "start_time": "2026-06-19T06:25:00.151750100Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "df = eet.add_capacity(\n",
    "    df=standardized_data_merged,\n",
    "    df_primitives=segmented_data,\n",
    "    config=eet.BatteryConfig.DEFAULT,\n",
    "    neware_bool=True,\n",
    "    verbose=True,\n",
    ")"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 12,
   "id": "added_cols_08",
   "metadata": {
    "ExecuteTime": {
     "end_time": "2026-06-19T06:25:04.402616200Z",
     "start_time": "2026-06-19T06:25:04.367212500Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "text/plain": [
       "['Capacity[Ah]']"
      ]
     },
     "execution_count": 12,
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "execute_result"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "added_cols = [c for c in df.columns if c not in standardized_data_merged.columns]\n",
    "added_cols"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "2e3d7041d352e0f2",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "<div class=\"alert alert-block alert-warning\">\n",
    "<b>Warning:</b> Capacity values are only added to the respective datarow at the end of a capacity determination step\n",
    "</div>"
   ]
